india_trends.title: GIFT City funds ask government to undo RBI’s foreign asset reporting mandate
india_trends.summary: Alternative Investment funds warn that the RBI’s rule that deems them resident Indians when reporting foreign assets creates a regulatory overlap that threatens their offshore status and ease of doing business at the international finance hub.

india_trends.title: Mcap of top 8 of 10 firms see value surge by ₹1.87 lakh crore; Airtel leads pack with ₹58,821 crore gain
